profile.title: Profile
profile.privateNotice: This profile is private. Add as a friend to see their full profile.
profile.mapPublicToggleHint: Toggle whether your route map is publicly viewable

landing.heroTitle: Walk every street. See your progress.
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your GPS tracks, watch your map fill up, and join a community of walkers exploring their neighborhoods — completely free.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to track your walks
landing.featureUploadDesc: Upload tracks from Strava, Garmin, or any GPS app and see them on an interactive map.
landing.featureCoverageDesc: See exactly which streets you've walked and track your progress toward covering your whole area.
landing.featureSocialDesc: Follow friends, view their routes on the map, and share your walking achievements.
landing.featureLeaderboardDesc: Friendly competition to motivate more walking and exploring in your community.
landing.communityDesc: No subscriptions. No premium tiers. No ads. Walk Tracker Map is community-driven and open source — built by people who love walking and want to share it with everyone.
landing.privacySubtitle: Walking routes can reveal where you live and work. We built powerful privacy tools so you can share your progress without sharing your address.
landing.privacyZonesDesc: Draw circles or custom polygons around sensitive locations like your home or office. Route data inside these zones is automatically clipped before anyone else sees it.
landing.privacyAutoTrimDesc: One toggle hides the first and last 200 meters of every route — no zones needed. Great as a quick baseline protection.
landing.privacyProfileDesc: Set your profile to private, hide your route map from the public, or keep everything open — it's up to you.
landing.privacyCta: Set up your privacy zones in Settings after signing in.
landing.exportSubtitle: Already tracking your walks? Here's how to get your GPX data from popular apps into Walk Tracker Map.
landing.exportStravaStep1: Go to strava.com and open the activity you want to export
landing.exportStravaStep2: Click the ⋯ menu and select "Export GPX"
landing.exportStravaStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportGarminStep1: Go to connect.garmin.com and navigate to Activities
landing.exportGarminStep2: Open an activity, click the ⚙ icon → "Export to GPX"
landing.exportGarminStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportKomootStep1: Open your completed tour on komoot.com
landing.exportKomootStep2: Scroll down and click "GPX Download" under tour details
landing.exportKomootStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportAlltrailsStep1: Open a trail or recorded activity on alltrails.com
landing.exportAlltrailsStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportPolarStep2: Open a session, click "Export" and choose GPX format
landing.exportPolarStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportSuuntoStep1: Go to suuntoapp.com and navigate to your exercises
landing.exportSuuntoStep2: Open an exercise, click ⋯ → "Export as GPX"
landing.exportSuuntoStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportMapmyrunStep1: Go to mapmyrun.com and open your workout details
landing.exportMapmyrunStep2: Click "Export as" and select GPX format
landing.exportMapmyrunStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.exportWikilocStep1: Find and open a trail on wikiloc.com
landing.exportWikilocStep2: Click the "Download" button → select GPX format
landing.exportWikilocStep3: Upload the downloaded GPX file to Walk Tracker Map
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the community and start tracking your walks. It's completely free.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacyZonesDesc: Define areas to hide from your public routes. Route data near these zones will be clipped before others see it.
settings.confirmDeleteZone: Delete this privacy zone? Your routes will become fully visible in this area.
settings.clickToPlace: Click on the map to place the center, then drag to adjust.
settings.drawPolygon: Click on the map to draw your polygon shape.
settings.autoTrimDesc: Automatically hide the first and last 200m of every route, even without privacy zones.
settings.noZones: No privacy zones yet. Add one to protect your home location.

errors.NOT_FOUND_ROUTE: Route not found or access denied
errors.NOT_FOUND_ROAD_NETWORK: Road network not loaded yet. Please fetch it first.
errors.VALIDATION_SELF_FRIEND: You cannot add yourself as a friend
errors.FRIENDSHIP_NOT_PENDING: This friend request is no longer pending
errors.FRIENDSHIP_NOT_RECEIVER: You cannot respond to this request
errors.EXTERNAL_OVERPASS_API: Road network service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
